user.title: Maytronics Dolphin Plus (BLE)
user.description: Local Bluetooth control for robots paired with the MyDolphin Plus app (v3.x). Enter the BLE MAC from your phone or HA Bluetooth. Legacy MyDolphin robots should use the other integration.

init.title: Dolphin Plus options
init.description: IoT PSU robots (E35i / IoT230) need a command path: local BlueZ GATT server (dongle on HA) or an ESPHome proxy flashed with esphome/dolphin-plus-ble-proxy.yaml.example. Close the Plus app on your phone while HA controls the robot.

error.esphome_device_required: Select an ESPHome proxy device when using the ESPHome backend.
error.esphome_notify_missing: That ESPHome device has no dolphin_iot_notify action. Flash esphome/dolphin-plus-ble-proxy.yaml.example first.
